name: testAddUserWithExistingEmail
description: Adding a user with an existing email address results in an error message.
descriptionHtml: Adding a user with an existing email address results in an error message.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Adding a user with an existing email address results in an error message.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0717.195751.25 test run company' company using filter
Click on the 'Create' button and trigger an error
Verify: Error message is displayed for existing user
